publicSchemaLimitation.shippingPackageReadRoot: The checked-in public Admin GraphQL 2025-01 conformance schema has no shipping package read root for downstream package reads.
publicSchemaLimitation.shippingPackageMakeDefaultPayload.shippi: The configured 2025-01 conformance target rejected selecting this payload field with undefinedField, while the ticket references an internal Core payload contract that includes it.

coveredAssertions: shippingPackageUpdate stages known custom package fields and preserves normalized package state.
shippingPackageMakeDefault returns the updated shippingPackage payload with id, name, default, and updatedAt when selected.
shippingPackageMakeDefault clears the previous local default and marks the selected package as default.
shippingPackageMakeDefault unknown and missing id branches return the captured top-level RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND error shape and leave staged package state unchanged.
shippingPackageDelete marks the local package deleted and appends the original raw mutation to the staged mutation log.
notes: This local-runtime fixture intentionally contains no Shopify payload data, seed records, or upstream cassette calls. It exists only so conformance inventory can point at the committed runtime tests that enforce the local contract for a payload field unavailable through the public conformance schema.
